title: Yu-You Liou
text: I am Yu-You Liou, born in Taichung in 1997. I have been a PhD candidate in Agricultural Economics at National Taiwan University since 2023 and an adjunct lecturer at Shih Chien University since 2024. I primarily teach undergraduate courses in statistics, data analysis, and programming for applications. My research focuses on two main areas: (1) Agricultural, natural resource, environmental, and ecological economics, and (2) Urban, rural, regional, real estate, and transportation economics. Please find my CV.

title: Yu-You Liou
text:
Acknowledgement
I am profoundly grateful to Professor Hung-Hao Chang for his academic guidance and personal support throughout my master’s and doctoral journey. His mentorship has left a lasting impact for which I will always be thankful.
